text:
The complaint and the summons or notice to appear on a charge of speeding under this subtitle must specify:

(1) the maximum or minimum speed limit applicable in the district or at the location; and

(2) the speed at which the defendant is alleged to have driven.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 543. Arrest & Prosecution of Violators
##### § 543.010 — Specifications of Speeding Charge

The complaint and the summons or notice to appear on a charge of speeding under this subtitle must specify:

    (1) the maximum or minimum speed limit applicable in the district or at the location; and

    (2) the speed at which the defendant is alleged to have driven.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The complaint and the summons or notice to appear on a charge of speeding under this subtitle must specify:
the maximum or minimum speed limit applicable in the district or at the location; and
the speed at which the defendant is alleged to have driven.
